mapper.insert: INSERT INTO youtube_comment_analysis_histories ( user_id, video_url, video_title, original_file_path, original_saved_at, remark ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{videoUrl}, #{videoTitle}, #{originalFilePath}, #{originalSavedAt}, #{remark} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, video_url, video_title, original_file_path, original_saved_at, preprocessed_file_path, preprocessed_saved_at, analysis_requested_at, remark, created_at, updated_at FROM youtube_comment_analysis_histories WHERE (#{userId} IS NULL OR user_id = #{userId}) ORDER BY id DESC

SELECT id, user_id, video_url, video_title, original_file_path, original_saved_at, preprocessed_file_path, preprocessed_saved_at, analysis_requested_at, remark, created_at, updated_at FROM youtube_comment_analysis_histories WHERE id = #{id} AND (#{userId} IS NULL OR user_id = #{userId}) LIMIT 1
